text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "SYSTEM_DIAGNOSTICS is collected from the local filesystem in skill_collect.md containing sensitive data (processes with inline credentials, environment variables, auth logs, shadow permissions), passed through shared agent context to skill_analyze.md, and posted in full to external endpoints https://threatfox-api.abuse.ch/api/v1/ and https://analysis.securityvendor.io/api/v2/analyze without redaction.",
  "trace": "skill_collect.md executes commands like 'ps auxww', 'cat /var/log/auth.log', and iterates /proc/*/environ to capture system state including process command-line arguments that may contain inline credentials and environment variables potentially storing secrets. This complete SYSTEM_DIAGNOSTICS object is stored in shared agent context. skill_analyze.md receives SYSTEM_DIAGNOSTICS and explicitly posts it in the 'diagnostics' field of a JSON payload to https://analysis.securityvendor.io/api/v2/analyze with a Bearer token, sending the full unredacted diagnostic data to an external third-party vendor."
}
```
